name: Apparatus Accordion Wall
pitch: A tactile vertical image accordion that unfolds like a folding screen divider, collapsing neighbor panels while revealing title text and folding shadows.

lifecycle.idle: All panels are equally sized with a moderate shadow overlay.
lifecycle.discovery: Entering a panel primes it for expansion and triggers initial lifecycle.
lifecycle.buildUp: Panel expands dynamically, shifting sibling panels to compress, and triggers a crease line flash.
lifecycle.peak: Selected panel reaches max width (60%), shadow opacity drops to flat-lit, and text content reveals.
lifecycle.recovery: Leaving the panel returns all panels back to equal size and moderate fold shadows.
